_meta.description: Beyond Paradise wildlife encounter calendar — month-by-month matrix for East Africa + Vietnam. This is the migration intelligence product.

jan.label: January

season.zanzibar: Short dry season (NE monsoon ending), calm Indian Ocean, excellent snorkelling
season.serengeti: Green season — Ndutu calving begins, exceptional predator density
season.masai-mara: Dry, warm. No migration, but resident wildlife excellent
season.vietnam: Cool and dry in north (Hanoi 15°C), warm in south. Best weather for Ha Long Bay

highlights.note: Peak month alongside December–February
Calving season begins. Highest predator density in Africa
Nesting season, feeding on seagrass
Calm seas, best water clarity

jan.weather_summary: Zanzibar: warm (30°C), calm, ideal marine. Serengeti: green and wet, dramatic cloud skies, few tourists. Mara: dry season, good game but no migration.

feb.label: February

season.zanzibar: Warm, clear, light NE winds. Best month for snorkelling and diving
season.serengeti: Calving peak. Short rains ending. Ndutu lake fills
season.vietnam: Dry, warm, low season (good value). Hoi An at its best

highlights.note: Still peak season
Peak calving — up to 8,000 calves per day
Cheetah hunting calves — best cheetah observation month

feb.weather_summary: Best month in Zanzibar for marine activities. Best month for calving plains game in southern Serengeti.

mar.label: March

season.zanzibar: Long rains beginning (March–May). Indian Ocean turns choppy. Avoid liveaboard
season.serengeti: Long rains begin. Herds start moving north. Roads can flood
season.vietnam: Warm and dry in central Vietnam (Hoi An ideal). Hanoi warming

highlights.note: Herds begin northward movement — early migration
Seas turning choppier — early mornings still good

avoid.note: Avoid Zanzibar liveaboard/snorkelling from mid-March — Indian Ocean swells increase
Avoid Mara — wettest month, most lodges in low-season rates

mar.weather_summary: Transition month. East Africa rains begin. Best marine window closing for Zanzibar.

apr.label: April

season.zanzibar: Long rains (heavy). Warm but rough. Many lodges close
season.serengeti: Long rains peak. Some roads impassable. Green, lush, dramatic
season.masai-mara: Wet season. Low prices, few tourists
season.vietnam: Warm season begins in south. Central Vietnam occasional rain

highlights.note: Hundreds of Palearctic migrants before departing to Europe

avoid.note: Avoid Zanzibar marine — heavy rain, rough Indian Ocean, reduced visibility

apr.weather_summary: Shoulder/low season for most East Africa. Dramatic green landscapes but logistics harder.

may.label: May

season.zanzibar: Long rains tapering. SE trade winds beginning
season.serengeti: End of long rains. Herds gathering in north-central Serengeti
season.masai-mara: Rains tapering. Transition to dry season
season.vietnam: Hot season in south (Ho Chi Minh 34°C). Ideal in north (Hanoi)

highlights.note: Migration concentrating before Grumeti River crossing
Over 200 recorded species. Endemic species best before full dry season

may.weather_summary: Good transition month. Rains easing. Prices still low in most camps.

jun.label: June

season.zanzibar: SE trade winds (Kusi). Indian Ocean choppy. Cooler (25°C). Good diving on western coast
season.serengeti: Dry season begins. Migration at Grumeti River. Excellent game viewing
season.masai-mara: Long dry season starts. Migration arriving from Serengeti
season.vietnam: Hot and humid in south. Central Vietnam: beach season begins (Hoi An)

highlights.note: Grumeti River crossings begin. Most dramatic and least crowded migration spectacle
Dry season: short grass, easier sighting. Pride interaction during migration
Concentrated in river pools during dry season

avoid.note: Avoid Zanzibar snorkelling — SE monsoon makes Indian Ocean choppy on east coast

jun.weather_summary: Best safari month for Serengeti (Grumeti migration + excellent game). Zanzibar east coast marine activities reduced.

jul.label: July

season.zanzibar: SE trade winds peak. Cool and breezy (24°C). Kitesurfing excellent (Paje). West coast calmer for diving
season.serengeti: Dry season peak. Migration in northern Serengeti approaching Mara
season.vietnam: Monsoon season in north (Hanoi heavy rain). Central (Hoi An) warm + sunny. South: dry

highlights.note: First herds crossing into Mara from Serengeti. River crossings from mid-July
Lion prides follow migration — highest lion viewing density of the year
Migrating past Tanzania coast on way north from Southern Ocean
Peak trade winds 18–25 knots. Beginner to advanced conditions

jul.weather_summary: Peak safari season for Mara migration and Serengeti. Book 12+ months ahead. Zanzibar east coast marine limited but kitesurf excellent.

aug.label: August

season.zanzibar: Trade winds easing. Still cool. Kitesurf still excellent. Ocean improving east coast
season.serengeti: Dry season peak. Northern Serengeti excellent. Migration at Mara
season.masai-mara: Migration PEAK. River crossings daily. Most expensive month
season.vietnam: Monsoon north (Hanoi), dry south, mixed central

highlights.note: PEAK. Multiple river crossings per day possible. Best photography conditions
Highest concentration of predators following migration
Peak passage month through Tanzania waters
Dry season: excellent leopard sighting in Seronera woodland

avoid.note: August is most expensive month in Masai Mara. Book 12–18 months ahead for premium camps

aug.weather_summary: The single best month for East Africa wildlife. Most expensive. Book extremely early.

sep.label: September

season.zanzibar: SE winds calming. Indian Ocean warming. Ocean conditions improving east coast
season.serengeti: Dry season ending. Migration beginning return south
season.masai-mara: Migration still present but crossing intensity dropping
season.vietnam: North: rains easing. Central: excellent (Hoi An, Hue best month). South: dry

highlights.note: Still excellent. Crossings continuing. Slightly fewer tourists than August
Post-monsoon: ocean settling, turtles returning to feeding grounds

sep.weather_summary: Good second choice to August for migration. Cheaper, often same sighting quality. Vietnam central coast at its best.

oct.label: October

season.zanzibar: Short rains (vuli) beginning. Indian Ocean calming rapidly. Excellent snorkelling returns
season.serengeti: Short rains. Herds in south. Calving season approaching
season.masai-mara: Herds returning south. Short rains beginning in Kenya
season.vietnam: North: cool and dry (best for Hanoi). Central: occasional rain. South: dry

highlights.note: Season opens. Numbers building from October
Nesting season begins
Indian Ocean calming — ideal dolphin encounter conditions returning

oct.weather_summary: Excellent month for Zanzibar marine — ocean calming from monsoon. Whale shark season starting. Short rains add dramatic skies to safari.

nov.label: November

season.zanzibar: Short rains (moderate). Ocean calming. Excellent snorkelling and diving
season.serengeti: Short rains. Southern herds building. Excellent for photography (dramatic clouds, green)
season.masai-mara: Short rains. Low season rates. Good game without crowds
season.vietnam: North: cool dry. Central: mild (slight risk of storms fading). South: dry season begins

highlights.note: Season peak building — best month alongside December
Nesting + hatchlings
First calves beginning late November in good rain years

nov.weather_summary: Underrated month. Marine conditions excellent in Zanzibar, whale sharks peaking at Mafia, Serengeti dramatic.

dec.label: December

season.zanzibar: NE monsoon (Kasikazi) begins. Warm (30°C). Indian Ocean generally calm east coast
season.serengeti: Short dry period before calving. Herds on southern plains
season.masai-mara: Dry, warm. Christmas/New Year peak — book 12+ months ahead
season.vietnam: North: cold (Hanoi 15°C). Central: best weather (Hoi An, Da Nang). South: ideal

highlights.note: PEAK season — December–January highest probability
Active nesting
Early calves arriving on the southern plains

avoid.note: December Masai Mara prices peak at Christmas/NYE — often 50–100% premium

dec.weather_summary: Best month for whale sharks at Mafia Island. Zanzibar marine excellent. Serengeti building to calving season.

quick_reference.vietnam_best_weather: Nov–Apr (dry season nationally, varies by region)
